column2:
심선절단 (A core wire cutting)
  - 절연피복 STRIP시 심선에 흠 또는 그로인한 심선의 끊어짐이 없도록 할 것. (In case of insulation STRIP, make sure that the core is not damaged or broken.)
 압착상태 (pressed condition)
  - 심선압착부 내측에 유지류 또는 기타 이물질이 없을 것. (Core apchakppu inner will not be fat and oils or other debris.)
  - 압착시 심선 압착부의 이음매에 심선의 일부가빠져 나오지 말 것. (Do not remove any part of the heart from the seam of the heart's compression section when)
  - 절연 피복의 일부가 심선 압착부에 들어가지 말 것. (Do not allow any part of the insulation to enter the core compression section.)
  - 압착부 절연피복은 절연피복 압착부에 고정될 것. (The insulation of the compression part shall be fixed to the insulation compression part.)
 외 관 (The external appearance)
  - 사용상 문제가 없을 것. (No problem in use.)
